metadata.title:
TWO STATES GOULD


FEED WHOLE WORLD


ON IRISH LEMONS

Colorado Potato Producer
Says Idaho Can Raise
as Much as Whole


Country.

pages.raw_text:
TWIN FALLS, Idaho. Jan. %
That the states of Idaho and Col
Orado are capable of raising enough
potatoes to feed the whole world is
the declaration made here the
other day by f.. II. Grub. an extern
sive potato raiser of Carbonate,
Colo, following an extensive in
vestigation of the broad expanses
of land being put under water in
this state.


Mr.. Grubb declares that the state
of Colorado will be able to increase
its production of potatoes quite
materially, but that with the COM
pletiOn Of several of the irrigation
projects that are now under way,
100000 acres of land particularly
adapted to the potato culture will
be ready to raise crops. These he
declares will be capable of rails
ing 800 bushels to the acre and per
haps more. He is of the belief, he
declares, that Idaho can then raise
easily 300.O00,000 bushels of pota-
toes annually. This is as much as
is raised in the whole country at
the present
